description_long: This is a large, elegant bungalow set within a spacious, landscaped property featuring manicured lawns, numerous trees, and decorative shrubbery. The main building has a light-colored exterior with a complex, multi-sectioned roof, and several architectural features such as arched entryways, balconies, and a prominent front porch. The grounds include paved driveways, walkways, and a backyard area with a pool, as well as multiple garden beds and outdoor seating areas. The property is bordered by a mix of hedges and trees, providing privacy and a lush, green environment. There are also detached structures, possibly garages or guest houses, located at the periphery of the lot. The overall setting suggests a high-end residential estate designed for comfort, leisure, and visual appeal.
description: A large, upscale bungalow with a complex roof, landscaped gardens, a pool, and multiple outdoor living spaces, set within a private, tree-lined property.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, circular driveway, and prominent front porch with landscaped gardens and trees.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard pool, patio area, and extensive greenery surrounding the bungalow.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the main building's multi-level roof, balconies, and dense tree border for privacy.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the detached structures, garden beds, and additional driveway access.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and individual windows on all facades
